caption: A man with glasses and a large, light-colored, textured wig is recording a podcast in a room filled with clothing and framed photos. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red and white patterned bow tie, and tan suspenders, with large black headphones over his ears. A black microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. In the background, a wall displays numerous framed pictures, and clothing racks with shirts and bags are visible, including a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". A logo in the bottom left corner reads "#FESTALIB PODCAST", and text on the right reads "TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture and head position slightly while speaking, moving from a centered position to a slight profile view, though he remains focused toward the microphone.
